generalReviewHandoff.handoffSummary: General review reported zero blockers and handed off source-row authority, safe evidence, exporter behavior, unavailable global tooling, and workbook artifact boundaries for dedicated security validation.

warnings.summary: Repository-wide build, lint, type-check, format, and coverage tooling is unavailable; Python exporter pytest passed and unavailable tooling is carried forward without being treated as passing evidence.

warningCarryForward.summary: Carry forward unavailable global tooling as a non-blocking verification note; scoped Python exporter tests passed.

unavailableTooling: Scoped command available and passed: python -m pytest python/tests -p no:cacheprovider -> 20 passed in 1.02s.
